positive: A stylized, minimalist geometric composition featuring a whimsical cluster of glowing celestial bodies and orbiting constellations. The main elements are abstract, forming interconnected lines and perfect arcs. Use a deep indigo and sapphire blue color palette contrasted with brilliant gold and pearlescent white highlights. The style is a fusion of Art Deco elegance and sacred geometry, suitable for a clean, repeating, and highly scalable apparel print. The composition must be centrally balanced, featuring sharp silhouettes and strong contrast. The design should resemble a blueprint or an ancient celestial map, suitable for printing on dark backgrounds. Intricate line work, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, lowres, ugly, grainy, cropped, deformed, writing
